text.message: I may have made a mistake
Blue remember what I’ve just done for you
game is over if we cant help eachother out
trying to pop to get that off you
sorry it just doesnt help right now at all
i messed up our last trade on my math and it cost me
And get blocked and stolen every turn
think how far ahead youd be if we hadnt been then
So it seems right to call it out
do you not want me to have army...
